# 12462 docs site accuracy pass

Date: 2026-07-04

## Scope

- Expanded `test:launch-qa:docs` to scan the public docs site, root repo docs, and top-level `docs/` content.
- Reconciled stale docs links, commands, anchors, generated action catalog output, Mintlify MDX syntax, and generated brand assets.
- Regenerated action/provider docs through `bun run --cwd packages/prompts build`; `packages/docs/action-catalog.md` is now generated by `packages/prompts/scripts/generate-action-docs.js`.

## Evidence

```bash
git diff --check
node --check packages/scripts/launch-qa/check-docs.mjs
node --check packages/prompts/scripts/generate-action-docs.js
node packages/scripts/launch-qa/check-docs.mjs --scope=docs
bun test packages/scripts/launch-qa/check-docs.test.ts
bun run --cwd packages/docs test
bun run --cwd packages/docs lint:check
bun run --cwd packages/docs format:check
bun run --cwd packages/prompts build
bun run test:launch-qa
bun run check:agents-claude
cd packages/docs && bunx mintlify@latest validate
cd packages/docs && bunx mintlify@latest broken-links
```

All commands above exited 0 in the final local run.

## Full verify attempt

`bun run verify` was attempted after rebasing onto `origin/develop`. It failed in unrelated lint tasks outside this docs branch before the full suite could complete:

- `@elizaos/plugin-computeruse#lint` reported pre-existing lint errors in `plugins/plugin-computeruse`.
- `@elizaos/electrobun#lint` reported a pre-existing formatter error in `packages/app-core/platforms/electrobun/src/voice/voice-service.test.ts`.

The failed verify run also auto-wrote unrelated lint changes; those uncommitted writes were discarded and are not part of this branch.

## Manual review notes

- Read the generated `packages/docs/action-catalog.md` header and spot-checked generated action/provider sections after regeneration.
- Read the Mintlify failure output before fixing it: stale `CardGroup.Card` closers, package-local AGENTS/CLAUDE MDX comments, a malformed tab code block, one HTML image asset path, and security mirror links.
- Confirmed Mintlify `validate` reports `success build validation passed`.
- Confirmed Mintlify `broken-links` reports `success no broken links found`.

## N/A

- Real-LLM trajectories: N/A - docs/checker/generator-only change; no agent action/provider behavior or prompt runtime was changed.
- Backend/frontend runtime logs: N/A - no server, app, desktop, mobile, or cloud UI runtime path was changed.
- Video walkthrough/screenshots: N/A - docs-source and generated-reference accuracy pass; Mintlify build and link validation are the rendered-site gates for this change.
